query: color banding posterized gradient sky digital artifact
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — color banding in skies, posterization artifacts

response.objective_caption: A turquoise steel arch bridge spans across the upper portion of the frame, photographed from below against a cloud-filled sky. A bird flies in the left portion of the sky. In the background, a massive concrete dam stretches across a mountain valley, with forested slopes rising on both sides and snow-dusted peaks visible in the distance. A metal guardrail runs across the bottom foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A turquoise steel arch bridge spans across the upper portion of the frame, photographed from below against a cloud-filled sky. A bird flies in the left portion of the sky. In the background, a massive concrete dam stretches across a mountain valley, with forested slopes and snow-dusted peaks visible in the distance. A metal guardrail runs across the bottom foreground. The scene is suffused with a cold cyan-teal sickly color cast and muted, faded tones. Flat, directionless light from the heavy cloud cover eliminates shadows, while the bleak industrial and natural forms combine to create an oppressive, melancholic atmosphere evoking unease.
